description: RemoteWorker R1 provider-owned slide app bundle service for Workspace Manager installs

v.v: RemoteWorker R1 提供的端到端颜色生成器，通过控制总线安装到 UI Server 后生成并展示颜色。

| Stage | Path |
|---|---|
| 1 | UI event -> UI Server host egress |
| 2 | Model 0 `mt_bus_send` / `pin.bus.cb.out` -> MBR |
| 3 | MQTT `UIPUT/.../R1/100/submit` -> RemoteWorker R1 / Model 100 / `submit` |
| 4 | MQTT response on same endpoint topic -> MBR |
| 5 | UI Server owner materialization by `reply_target_*` -> Local UI refresh |
最小 Submit 双总线示例
RemoteWorker R1 提供的最小 Submit 双总线示例，通过输入、提交和回写展示完整远端处理链路。
最小 Submit 双总线示例
输入要发送到 remote-worker R1 的内容
